case_title: RITESH C. NORONHA et al VS. EDMUNDO GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED; POS FILED PRIOR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORONHA, RITESH C. YUN, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, EDMUNDO $430.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $510.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,557.00 FILED BY NORONHA, RITESH C. YUN, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, EDMUNDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, EDMUNDO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
